args: TOKEN="${GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN:-${GITHUB_TOKEN:-$(gh auth token 2>/dev/null)}}"; [ -n "$TOKEN" ] || { echo 'GitHub MCP: missing token (run gh auth login or set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN)' >&2; exit 1; }; export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN="$TOKEN"; exec npx --yes @modelcontextprotocol/server-github
